Steve's Verdict: Best Budget Pick

One Beat 6-outlet surge protector with 4 USB ports (2 USB-C): flat plug, 5 ft braided cord, wall-mountable. Honest review + why this is the last power strip you'll need for home/office/dorm. Pros/cons.

📝 Steve's Personal Notes

"Power strips are one of those things you don't appreciate until you have the right one – and the One Beat 6-outlet surge protector with 4 USB ports including 2 USB-C is so perfect I bought one for everyone in the house plus extras for the living room and my desk."

Steve's Photo Proof

Every product on SteveGet is owned and tested by Steve. Here's the proof:

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Wide spaced outlets – fits big plugs without blocking
  • 4 USB ports (2 USB-C) – ends charger stealing & clutter
  • Strong braided cord – durable, tangle-free, lasts forever
  • Flat plug + wall-mount – clean, out-of-the-way install
  • Right cord length options – no tripping hazards
  • Surge protection – safer for family/tech
  • Family-approved – bought one for everyone!

❌ Cons

  • Braided cord slightly thicker than plain (trade-off for durability)
  • No on/off switch on some models (check variant)
  • Bulk buying recommended for multi-room use (but worth it)

Key Specifications

6 widely spaced outlets
4 USB ports (2 USB-C)
5 ft braided cord
flat plug
wall-mountable
surge protection
compact size
perfect for home office dorm and travel

Where to Buy

Pick the one you prefer — same great product, your choice of store.
